creator: rallenh@hotmail.com
text:
Hi Dimitry,

I can confirm that your patch does allow isc-dhcp30-server to build on
-STABLE (as of this past weekend). I can also confirm that dhcpd worked
after building and installing. I can confirm that my client PCs were able to
get DHCP addresses buy releasing and renewing.

I will be upgrading my -STABLE box soon because of FreeBSD-SA-09:05.telnetd.
I will report back if there are any issues, as I run a portupgrade -a after
every -STABLE upgrade.
